metadata.relation_to_case: Former Security Head, Noida Public School

content: I was fired from the school in August 2023 after I reported Vikram Mehta’s illegal land acquisition in Sector 45. I was framed for theft — I didn’t steal anything. I didn’t kidnap Arjun. I was at home on October 15. I didn’t go to the school. I didn’t know he was being taken. I didn’t know Ramesh Kumar was involved. I hate Vikram, yes, but I wouldn’t hurt a child. I’ve got a daughter of my own. I’m not a monster. I don’t know why the police think I’m involved. I didn’t use a burner phone. I don’t have one.
